programs.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programs.desc: Officers in Franklin assist in a pursuit of a suspected robbery suspect; in Warwick, a driver suspected of DUI takes a sobriety test but faces an unexpected wardrobe issue; in Pasco, surveillance and a warrant lead to an arrest.

programs.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programs.desc: In El Paso, police engage in a struggle with a suspect who reportedly attempts to flee; in Mission, officers respond to a serious car accident; in Greene County, a man believed to be an escaped convict leads police on a wild pursuit.

programs.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programs.desc: Franklin County officers comfort a woman after her partner's alleged stash ends their evening; in Florida, a man's self-proclaimed "training" video leads to legal trouble; in Warwick, officers respond to a reported break-in.

programs.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programs.desc: The K9 units are on the chase with pursuits in Richland and Pasco Counties, a fleeing vehicle triggers a high-speed pursuit in Franklin County, and it's sassy backtalk in Mission, Texas.

programs.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programs.desc: A K9 in Greene County tracks down a suspected stolen car driver; in Warwick, a bar patron insists he wasn't driving; in Mission, officers question a confused burglary suspect.

programs.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programs.desc: In El Paso, police engage in a struggle with a suspect who reportedly attempts to flee; in Mission, officers respond to a serious car accident; in Greene County, a man believed to be an escaped convict leads police on a wild pursuit.
